kw.name: New Browser
kw.doc: Create a new playwright Browser with specified options.
kw.msg: {"browser": "chromium", "headless": false, "chromiumSandbox": false, "devtools": false, "handleSIGHUP": true, "handleSIGINT": true, "handleSIGTERM": true, "slowMo": 0.0, "timeout": 30000.0, "tracesDir": "C:\\Users\\iTservice\\OneDrive\\\u0e40\u0e2d\u0e01\u0e2a\u0e32\u0e23\\pratice_Automate\\results\\browser\\traces\\temp\\fea57bf6-8e21-4a65-94c8-586f6ff3d23d"}
Starting Browser process C:\Users\iTservice\AppData\Local\Programs\Python\Python312\Lib\site-packages\Browser\wrapper\index.js using at 127.0.0.1:35873

Successfully created browser with options: {"browser":"chromium","headless":false,"chromiumSandbox":false,"devtools":false,"handleSIGHUP":true,"handleSIGINT":true,"handleSIGTERM":true,"slowMo":0,"timeout":30000,"tracesDir":"C:\\Users\\iTservice\\OneDrive\\เอกสาร\\pratice_Automate\\results\\browser\\traces\\temp\\fea57bf6-8e21-4a65-94c8-586f6ff3d23d"}

kw.name: New Page
kw.doc: Open a new Page.
kw.msg: Successfully initialized new page object and opened url: https://practice.expandtesting.com/webpark
No context was open. New context was automatically opened when this page is created.

kw.name: Set Browser Timeout
kw.doc: Sets the timeout used by most input and getter keywords.

kw.name: Select Options By
kw.doc: Selects options from select element found by ``selector``.
kw.msg: Selects the option(s) Long-Term Garage Parking by attribute SelectAttribute.label from element id=parkingLot.

kw.name: Fill Text
kw.doc: Clears and fills the given ``txt`` into the text field found by ``selector``.
kw.msg: Fills the text '2026-05-01' in the given field.

kw.name: Fill Text
kw.doc: Clears and fills the given ``txt`` into the text field found by ``selector``.
kw.msg: Fills the text '10:00' in the given field.

kw.name: Fill Text
kw.doc: Clears and fills the given ``txt`` into the text field found by ``selector``.
kw.msg: Fills the text '2026-05-01' in the given field.

kw.name: Fill Text
kw.doc: Clears and fills the given ``txt`` into the text field found by ``selector``.
kw.msg: Fills the text '10:30' in the given field.

kw.name: Click
kw.doc: Simulates mouse click on the element found by ``selector``.
kw.msg: Clicks the element 'xpath=//button[contains(text(), 'Calculate')]'.

kw.name: Get Text
kw.doc: Returns text attribute of the element found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.
kw.msg: Slept 1 second
